caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown lectern equipped with two microphones, speaking in front of a textured, green stone wall accented by two golden cylindrical pillars containing pink flowers. He is dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit consisting of a white kurta and a cream-colored Nehru jacket. Across the sequence, he delivers a speech, using active hand gestures to emphasize his points. He begins with both hands raised and open, then brings them together in front of him with fingers interlaced. Subsequently, he raises his left hand while gesturing with his right, and finally brings both hands together in a rhythmic motion near the lectern. The camera remains in a static medium shot, capturing his upper body and the symmetrical background throughout the progression of the clip.
